parameters:
Orc: Sorry~ The dresses are being altered right now~
(＊Will be available after clearing the tower)
Ah... not that I want to try it on or anything...!

It's not like an old lady like me would look good in
it anyway...

Despite her words, Mother keeps stealing longing
glances at the wedding dress...

(Come to think of it, I heard Mom and Dad couldn't
afford a wedding ceremony...)
(Alright! We have money now, let's buy it!)

(I want to buy it, but I don't have the money... I
wonder if someone could exchange this gold nugget I
found for cash~?)
